title: Ship doctor in stable condition after testing positive
excerpt: A ship doctor who developed symptoms on April 30 tested positive for Andes hantavirus on May 6

title: Woman dies aboard cruise ship, hantavirus confirmed
excerpt: A 72-year-old German woman who developed fever died on May 2 aboard the MV Hondius

title: Two UK nationals confirm positive for hantavirus
excerpt: British health authorities confirmed two UK nationals have tested positive for hantavirus

title: Swiss patient tests positive after disembarking
excerpt: A man who disembarked in Saint Helena tested positive on May 5, now isolating at a Swiss hospital

title: CDC monitors 7 people across five states
excerpt: US health authorities are monitoring seven people across Arizona, California, Georgia, Texas, and Virginia

title: Spain approves ship arrival in Canary Islands
excerpt: Spain approved the plan for the MV Hondius to dock in Tenerife, coordinating with the WHO

title: Woman dies in Johannesburg hospital after ship exposure
excerpt: A 69-year-old Dutch woman who went ashore at Saint Helena died on April 26 at a Johannesburg hospital
